QF.id: Retirement Planning Products: National Pension System (NPS)_45

question.text: What is the minimum contribution required to open an NPS Tier II account?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** The minimum contribution to open a Tier II account is Rs.1,000. Subsequent contributions have a minimum of Rs.250. **The Trap:** Rs.500 is the minimum per-transaction amount for Tier I, not Tier II opening. Rs.250 is Tier II subsequent minimum, not opening. **Cross-Exam Context:** Tier II: Rs.1,000 opening, Rs.250 subsequent, no annual minimum, free withdrawal, up to 100% equity, requires active Tier I. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Tier II is an excellent low-cost investment vehicle. The Rs.1,000 opening amount and Rs.250 subsequent minimum make it very accessible.
